view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where settings are copied from one business to another. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or confirmations regarding the execution of this scenario, nor does it detail the expected behavior or outcomes. As such, it is not possible to determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report, leading to an inconclusive status.
